title: Epitrachys rigida
taxonomy: Epitrachys rigida is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The classification of Epitrachys rigida includes it being a part of the genus Epitrachys and the order Sapindales. Epitrachys rigida is an evergreen shrub or small tree that produces small white flowers. The exact classification and taxonomy of Epitrachys rigida may be subject to change as new research emerges.
